channel.title: iamrizwan
channel.description: Developer blog by Rizwan — SPFx webparts, Power Platform solutions, SharePoint development tips.

item.title: Microsoft Graph API: 10 Practical Examples for SharePoint Developers (2026)
item.description: Stop reading docs and start building. Here are 10 copy-paste Graph API examples for SharePoint — from fetching user profiles and querying sites to creating pages, uploading files, and setting up webhooks.

item.title: Building a Custom SPFx Web Part: CRUD Operations with React + PnPjs (2026)
item.description: Go beyond Hello World — build a production-ready SPFx web part that creates, reads, updates, and deletes SharePoint list items using React and PnPjs v4. Covers environment setup, property pane configuration, and deployment.

item.title: Power Automate + SharePoint: 7 Document Workflows That Save Hours Every Week (2026)
item.description: Stop doing manual document management. Here are 7 Power Automate workflows for SharePoint that handle approvals, metadata tagging, archiving, notifications, and more — including the new unified workflows experience shipping in March 2026.

item.title: Power Automate + AI Builder: Intelligent Document Processing Complete Guide
item.description: Learn how to build automated document processing pipelines using Power Automate and AI Builder — extract data from invoices, receipts, and forms with prebuilt and custom AI models, no code required.

item.title: Building Viva Connections Adaptive Card Extensions (ACEs) with SPFx
item.description: A complete hands-on guide to creating Adaptive Card Extensions for Microsoft Viva Connections dashboards — from scaffolding your first ACE with SPFx to building interactive Quick View cards with real data.

item.title: Using Microsoft Graph API in SPFx: Fetch User Profiles, Teams, and Site Data
item.description: Learn how to use Microsoft Graph API in SharePoint Framework web parts — from setting up permissions to fetching user profiles, Teams memberships, and SharePoint site data with real code examples.

item.title: Building a Power Apps Canvas App with SharePoint: A Complete Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to building a fully functional Power Apps canvas app connected to a SharePoint list — from creating your data source to publishing a polished app with search, filters, and forms.

item.title: SPFx 1.23: The New CLI That Replaces Yeoman — What You Need to Know
item.description: Microsoft is replacing the Yeoman generator with a new open-source SPFx CLI in version 1.23. Here\

item.title: Building Declarative Agents for Microsoft 365 Copilot with Teams Toolkit
item.description: A hands-on guide to creating your first Copilot declarative agent — from scaffolding with Teams Toolkit to defining capabilities, adding API plugins, and deploying to your tenant.

item.title: SharePoint Agents: Build AI-Powered Assistants for Your Intranet
item.description: Learn how to create AI-powered agents that use your SharePoint site content as a knowledge base — from setup in Copilot Studio to deploying in Teams chat.

item.title: Building Your First SPFx Web Part: A Complete Hello World Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to creating your first SharePoint Framework (SPFx) web part — from scaffolding to deployment, with real screenshots from my tenant.

item.title: Building a SharePoint Approval Flow with Power Automate
item.description: How I built a document approval workflow using Power Automate that sends Teams notifications and updates SharePoint list status — complete walkthrough.

item.title: SharePoint Column Formatting: Beautiful List Views with JSON
item.description: Transform boring SharePoint lists into visual dashboards using JSON column formatting. Status badges, progress bars, and conditional icons — no code deployment needed.
